name: Business Central AL Copilot Starter Ruleset
description: Starter ruleset for AL development with GitHub Copilot. Suppressions must be justified and reviewed.

rules.justification: Use BEGIN..END consistently for compound statements.
Function calls should use parentheses for readability.
Control statements should start on a new line for readability.
Variable declarations should be ordered by type.
Variable and parameter naming should be reviewed for clarity.
Temporary variables should be prefixed with Temp.
Avoid assigning text to a target with smaller size.
